list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Refactor and enhance accounts_serializer script
Reorganized file structure and project settings by adding IntelliJ configuration files and updating the project's gitignore. Modified the accounts_serializer script to accept secrets in 'provider:secret' format and handle multiple providers and secrets per email, improving the structure and robustness of the saved account data. Updated README with enhanced usage instructions and examples.

task.summary:
Refactor and enhance accounts_serializer script
Reorganized file structure and project settings by adding IntelliJ configuration files and updating the project's gitignore. Modified the accounts_serializer script to accept secrets in 'provider:secret' format and handle multiple providers and secrets per email, improving the structure and robustness of the saved account data. Updated README with enhanced usage instructions and examples.

MESSAGE.value:
Refactor and enhance accounts_serializer script
Reorganized file structure and project settings by adding IntelliJ configuration files and updating the project's gitignore. Modified the accounts_serializer script to accept secrets in 'provider:secret' format and handle multiple providers and secrets per email, improving the structure and robustness of the saved account data. Updated README with enhanced usage instructions and examples.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Refactor and enhance accounts_serializer script
Reorganized file structure and project settings by adding IntelliJ configuration files and updating the project's gitignore. Modified the accounts_serializer script to accept secrets in 'provider:secret' format and handle multiple providers and secrets per email, improving the structure and robustness of the saved account data. Updated README with enhanced usage instructions and examples.
